category_sources: source_facts.description says it checks clusters for deprecated APIs; official GitHub README describes Kube No Trouble kubent as a tool to check deprecated API versions in Kubernetes clusters.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is kubent; official GitHub README identifies the command/project as Kube No Trouble (kubent).
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents installation, usage, supported collectors, arguments, Docker image, and CI usage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/doitintl/kube-no-trouble, so repository was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions deprecated APIs; official README mentions Kubernetes clusters, deprecated API versions, kubectl, Helm v3, and migration-oriented checks before upgrades.
